attributes.description: Tool call volume by userId over the selected time range. Filter: processType:mcpService AND eventName:"mcp.tool.execute"
attributes.title: Top 10 Users by MCP Tool Calls
attributes.visState: {"title": "Top 10 Users by MCP Tool Calls", "type": "horizontal_bar", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "userId", "size": 10, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1", "otherBucket": false, "missingBucket": false}}], "params": {"type": "histogram", "grid": {"categoryLines": false, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1"}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": false, "truncate": 200}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "BottomAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "Tool call count"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "histogram", "mode": "normal", "data": {"label": "Count", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": true}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": false, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {}, "thresholdLine": {"show": false, "value": 10, "width": 1, "style": "full", "color": "#E7664C"}}}

attributes.description: Volume of MCP tools/call events over time. Splitting by toolName is deferred until the upstream log_field_definitions mapping change lands (toolName is currently indexed as text and not aggregatable).
attributes.title: MCP Tool Calls
attributes.visState: {"title": "MCP Tool Calls", "type": "histogram", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "interval": "auto", "useNormalizedEsInterval": true, "scaleMetricValues": false, "drop_partials": false, "min_doc_count": 1, "extended_bounds": {}}}], "params": {"type": "histogram", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "Count"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "histogram", "mode": "normal", "data": {"label": "Count", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": true}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {"show": false}, "thresholdLine": {"show": false, "value": 10, "width": 1, "style": "full", "color": "#E7664C"}}}

attributes.description: Stacked-percentage breakdown of /mcp HTTP requests by statusClass (success / client_error / server_error). Filter: processType:mcpService AND interServiceRoute:"/mcp" AND statusCode:*
attributes.title: MCP Request Error Rate (% by statusClass)
attributes.visState: {"title": "MCP Request Error Rate (% by statusClass)", "type": "histogram", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "interval": "auto", "useNormalizedEsInterval": true, "min_doc_count": 1, "drop_partials": false, "extended_bounds": {}}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "group", "params": {"field": "statusClass", "size": 5, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1", "otherBucket": false, "missingBucket": false}}], "params": {"type": "histogram", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "percentage"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "% of requests"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "histogram", "mode": "stacked", "data": {"label": "Count", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": true}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {"show": false}, "thresholdLine": {"show": false, "value": 10, "width": 1, "style": "full", "color": "#E7664C"}}}

attributes.description: Avg used and total heap across all MCP service instances. Filter: processType:mcpService AND usedHeapSizeBytes:*
attributes.title: MCP Service Heap Usage (global avg)
attributes.visState: {"title": "MCP Service Heap Usage (global avg)", "type": "line", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "avg", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "usedHeapSizeBytes", "customLabel": "Used heap"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "avg", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "totalHeapSizeBytes", "customLabel": "Total heap"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "interval": "auto", "useNormalizedEsInterval": true, "min_doc_count": 1, "drop_partials": false, "extended_bounds": {}}}], "params": {"type": "line", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "bytes"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "line", "mode": "normal", "data": {"label": "Used heap", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": false, "interpolate": "linear"}, {"show": true, "type": "line", "mode": "normal", "data": {"label": "Total heap", "id": "2"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": false, "interpolate": "linear"}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {}, "thresholdLine": {"show": false, "value": 10, "width": 1, "style": "full", "color": "#E7664C"}}}

attributes.description: Tool call volume by applicationId over the selected time range. Filter: processType:mcpService AND eventName:"mcp.tool.execute"
attributes.title: Top 10 Applications by MCP Tool Calls
attributes.visState: {"title": "Top 10 Applications by MCP Tool Calls", "type": "horizontal_bar", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "applicationId", "size": 10, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1", "otherBucket": false, "missingBucket": false}}], "params": {"type": "histogram", "grid": {"categoryLines": false, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1"}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": false, "truncate": 200}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "BottomAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "Tool call count"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "histogram", "mode": "normal", "data": {"label": "Count", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": true}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": false, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {}, "thresholdLine": {"show": false, "value": 10, "width": 1, "style": "full", "color": "#E7664C"}}}

attributes.description: Avg used heap per MCP service instance. Filter: processType:mcpService AND usedHeapSizeBytes:*
attributes.title: MCP Service Heap Usage by serviceId
attributes.visState: {"title": "MCP Service Heap Usage by serviceId", "type": "line", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "avg", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "usedHeapSizeBytes", "customLabel": "Used heap"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "interval": "auto", "useNormalizedEsInterval": true, "min_doc_count": 1, "drop_partials": false, "extended_bounds": {}}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "group", "params": {"field": "serviceId", "size": 20, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1", "otherBucket": false, "missingBucket": false}}], "params": {"type": "line", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "bytes"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "line", "mode": "normal", "data": {"label": "bytes", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": false, "interpolate": "linear"}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {}, "thresholdLine": {"show": false, "value": 10, "width": 1, "style": "full", "color": "#E7664C"}}}

attributes.description: Percentile latency of mcp.tool.execute events. Filter: processType:mcpService AND eventName:"mcp.tool.execute"
attributes.title: MCP Tool Call Latency (p50 / p95 / p99)
attributes.visState: {"title": "MCP Tool Call Latency (p50 / p95 / p99)", "type": "line", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "percentiles", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "durationMs", "percents": [50, 95, 99], "keyed": false, "customLabel": "Latency"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "interval": "auto", "useNormalizedEsInterval": true, "min_doc_count": 1, "drop_partials": false, "extended_bounds": {}}}], "params": {"type": "line", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "ms"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "line", "mode": "normal", "data": {"label": "ms", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": false, "interpolate": "linear"}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {}, "thresholdLine": {"show": false, "value": 10, "width": 1, "style": "full", "color": "#E7664C"}}}
